d:I[75115,["/_next/static/chunks/2ej97fr2l1-az.js","/_next/static/chunks/2qc9kc2j3jnlj.js","/_next/static/chunks/3ixra_yp4lasn.js","/_next/static/chunks/0o3dc-vlk659u.js","/_next/static/chunks/2sswpbnhrliq0.js"],"default",1]

:HL["/_next/static/chunks/3z6fkzaalkg2l.css","style"]
2:T446,
            (function() {
              try {
                var pref = 'system';
                var raw = localStorage.getItem('takton-theme');
                if (raw) {
                  try {
                    var parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
                    if (parsed && parsed.state && parsed.state.theme) {
                      pref = parsed.state.theme;
                    } else if (raw === 'light' || raw === 'dark' || raw === 'system') {
                      pref = raw;
                    }
                  } catch (e1) {
                    if (raw === 'light' || raw === 'dark' || raw === 'system') pref = raw;
                  }
                }
                var resolved = pref;
                if (pref === 'system' || !pref) {
                  resolved = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light';
                }
                document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', resolved);
                document.documentElement.style.colorScheme = resolved;
              } catch(e) {}
            })();
